calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-25-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-25-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Perdue for Petitioner.

Mr. Perdue stated that there are a bunch of folks/missing relatives in Italy, but they are entitled to take. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived. Status on close of estate is set for February 25, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-22-2017 Continued To Aug-21-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-08-2017 Continued To May-22-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-10-2017 Continued To May-08-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Perdue for Annette Davary.

Mr. Perdue stated that he talked to Donald Salera, that he is prepared to file a declaration, that he did not get a date of death as to the various ancestors, that Donald and Al were related on the Father's side and that Donald has no information as to the Maternal side. Mr. Perdue also stated that the Mother came from Italy, that certain bequests go to neighbors, that the bulk of the Estate goes to charities, that there is $400,000.00 cash in various banks and a pension perhaps, that the house is in the Trust and that giving notice will not change the outcome. The Court asked about using a genealogical service. Mr. Perdue stated that he will file a declaration as to the efforts he has made so far and then a supplement. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to May 8, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
